name: Geez Habesha
tagline:
Authentic Ethiopian flavors on Havana Street.
Where tradition meets community.
address: 262 Havana St, Unit E, Aurora, CO 80010
about_paragraphs: Geez Habesha brings the warm, communal spirit of Ethiopian dining to Aurora's vibrant Havana Street corridor.
Our kitchen prepares traditional dishes using time-honored recipes and the finest spices — from our aromatic berbere-spiced stews to our fresh, spongy injera baked in-house daily.
Come for the food, stay for the hand-brewed Ethiopian coffee. This is more than a meal — it's an experience.

items.name: Doro Wot
items.desc: Chicken in berbere sauce with egg

reviews_list.text: The service was friendly and quick and the food was AMAZING! The injera was fresh and the stews were perfectly spiced. A hidden gem on Havana.
reviews_list.author: Google Reviewer

reviews_list.text: Delicious food, cute atmosphere, SUPER friendly staff! The coffee ceremony was an amazing experience we'll never forget.
reviews_list.author: First-time Visitor

reviews_list.text: Best Ethiopian food on Havana Street. The vegetarian platter is incredible — so many flavors, and the injera is the best I've had in Colorado.
reviews_list.author: Local Regular
